# Test: apx search/show/inspect with external API provenance
#
# This scenario verifies:
# 1. Search with --origin flag filters by origin
# 2. Search output shows [external]/[forked] tags
# 3. Show command displays Provenance section for external APIs
# 4. Inspect identity displays Origin/Import/Managed/Upstream for external APIs

# Setup: Create a canonical repo and register external APIs
mkdir canonical
cd canonical
exec git init
exec apx init canonical --org=testorg --repo=apis --skip-git --non-interactive

# Overwrite catalog/catalog.yaml with mixed first-party and external modules
exec sh -c 'echo "version: 1" > catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "org: testorg" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "repo: apis" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "modules:" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "  - id: proto/payments/ledger/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    name: proto/payments/ledger/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    format: proto" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    domain: payments" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    api_line: v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    description: Payment ledger API" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    version: v1.2.3" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    latest_stable: v1.2.3" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    lifecycle: stable" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    path: proto/payments/ledger/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "  - id: proto/google/pubsub/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    name: proto/google/pubsub/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    format: proto" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    domain: google" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    api_line: v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    description: Google Pub/Sub API" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    version: v1.0.0" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    latest_stable: v1.0.0" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    lifecycle: stable" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    path: google/pubsub/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    origin: external" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    managed_repo: github.com/Infoblox-CTO/apis-contrib-google" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    upstream_repo: github.com/googleapis/googleapis" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    upstream_path: google/pubsub/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    import_mode: preserve" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "  - id: proto/google/api/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    name: proto/google/api/v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    format: proto" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    domain: google" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    api_line: v1" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    description: Google Common API" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    version: v1.0.0" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    lifecycle: stable" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    path: google/api" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    origin: forked" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    managed_repo: github.com/Infoblox-CTO/apis-contrib-google" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    upstream_repo: github.com/googleapis/googleapis" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    upstream_path: google/api" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'
exec sh -c 'echo "    import_mode: rewrite" >> catalog/catalog.yaml'

# Search: all APIs
exec apx catalog search
stdout 'ledger'
stdout 'pubsub'
stdout 'api'

# Search: external APIs show [external] tag
exec apx catalog search --origin external
stdout 'pubsub'
stdout '\[external\]'
! stdout 'ledger'
! stdout '\[forked\]'

# Search: forked APIs show [forked] tag
exec apx catalog search --origin forked
stdout 'api'
stdout '\[forked\]'
! stdout 'ledger'
! stdout 'pubsub'

# Search: first-party only
exec apx catalog search --origin first-party
stdout 'ledger'
! stdout 'pubsub'
! stdout 'api'

# Show: external API displays Provenance section
exec apx catalog show proto/google/pubsub/v1
stdout 'Provenance'
stdout 'Origin:.*external'
stdout 'Import mode:.*preserve'
stdout 'Managed repo:.*github.com/Infoblox-CTO/apis-contrib-google'
stdout 'Upstream repo:.*github.com/googleapis/googleapis'
stdout 'Upstream path:.*google/pubsub/v1'

# Show: first-party API does NOT display Provenance
exec apx catalog show proto/payments/ledger/v1
! stdout 'Provenance'
! stdout 'Origin'

# Inspect identity: external API shows provenance lines
exec apx inspect identity proto/google/pubsub/v1
stdout 'Origin:.*external'
stdout 'Import:.*preserve'
stdout 'Managed:.*github.com/Infoblox-CTO/apis-contrib-google'
stdout 'Upstream:.*github.com/googleapis/googleapis'

# Inspect identity: first-party API does NOT show provenance
exec apx inspect identity proto/payments/ledger/v1
! stdout 'Origin:'
! stdout 'Import:'
! stdout 'Managed:'
! stdout 'Upstream:'
